## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs only

## How I tested

<!-- Loaded unpacked in Chrome and verified … -->

- [ ] `node --check` passes on changed `.js` files
- [ ] Manually verified in Chrome (load unpacked)
- [ ] Checked light **and** dark, and at least one other palette
- [ ] No new dependencies / no build step introduced

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (and `manifest.json` version if applicable)
- [ ] Reused existing CSS variables for theming
- [ ] PR is focused and described clearly
